titleStmt.title: SII 26.299: original edition by P. R. Srinivasan
No. 299. (A.R. No. 284 of 1909.) TIRUKKACHCHŪR, CHINGLEPUT TALUK, CHINGLEPUT DISTRICT.

p.hi: Tribhº Tribhuvanavīradēva Kulōttuṅga III: Year 37 = 1214-15 A.D.

summary.p: This inscription is incomplete. It records a gift of a sandhi lamp and a sum of 3 paḻaṅkāśu to provide for that, to the same temple as occurs in No. 283 above, by a certain Palakaṇṇan Vīdiviṭaṅkaṉ Vaḍuganāthaṉ of Iraiyūr in Kuṉṟa-nāḍu in Ūṟṟukkāṭṭuk-kōṭṭam in Jayaṅgoṇḍaśōḻa-maṇḍalam. The money was accepted by the Śivabrāhmaṇa who had right of worship in the temple, named Vināyaka-bhaṭṭaṉ, son of Kūtta-bhaṭṭaṉ of Gautama[gōtra], who must have agreed to carry out the object of the gift, as usual.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . tripuvanaccakkaravattikaḷ śrītripuvaṉaviratevaṟku yāṇṭu muppatteḻāvatu
jayaṅkoṇṭacoḻamaṇṭalattuk kaḷattūṟkoṭṭattuc ceṅkuṉṟanāṭṭut tirukaccūr Uṭaiyār
tiruvālakkopiluṭaiya nāyaṉāṟku Immaṇṭalattu Ūṟṟukkāṭṭukkoṭṭattuk kuṉṟaṉāṭṭu Iraiyūr pala
kaṇṇan vitiviṭaṅkaṉ vaṭukanātaneṉ vaitta cantiviḷakku Oṉṟukku Ikkoyiṟ kāṇi Uṭaiya civabraāmaṇan gautamaṉ kū
ttapaṭṭaṉ makaṉ viṉāyakapaṭṭaneṉ kaikkoṇṭa paḻaṅkācu 3 Ippaḻaṅkācu muṉṟuṅ kaikkoṇṭu cantiviḷakku Oṉ
Digital edition of SII 26.299 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
